svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content: <mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="ChatGPT"> <diagram id="sequence-diagram" name="Sequence Diagram"> <mxGraphModel dx="2380" dy="1278" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1900" pageHeight="1300" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;fontSize=24;fontStyle=1;" value="MACsec / MKA Integration Sequence" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="600" x="650" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="app" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#EDE7F6;strokeColor=#5E35B1;fontSize=16;" value="<b>Application</b><br/>Network Stack" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="260" x="100" y="85" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="macsec" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E8F5E9;strokeColor=#2E7D32;fontSize=16;" value="<b>MACsec API</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="260" x="500" y="85" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mka" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFF3E0;strokeColor=#EF6C00;fontSize=16;" value="<b>MKA</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="260" x="900" y="85" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="driver" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E3F2FD;strokeColor=#1565C0;fontSize=16;" value="<b>Ethernet Driver</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="260" x="1300" y="85" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="peer" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F5F5F5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=16;" value="<b>MACsec Peer</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="220" x="1640" y="85" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="life-app" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;html=1;strokeWidth=4;dashed=1;strokeColor=#888888;sourcePerimeterSpacing=0;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="230" y="155" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="230" y="1230" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="life-macsec" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;html=1;strokeWidth=4;dashed=1;strokeColor=#888888;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="630" y="155" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="630" y="1230" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="life-mka" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;html=1;strokeWidth=4;dashed=1;strokeColor=#888888;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="1030" y="155" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="1030" y="1230" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="life-driver" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;html=1;strokeWidth=4;dashed=1;strokeColor=#888888;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="1430" y="155" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="1430" y="1230" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="life-peer" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;html=1;strokeWidth=4;dashed=1;strokeColor=#888888;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="1750" y="155" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="1750" y="1230" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="phase-init" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F5F5F5;strokeColor=#777777;fontStyle=1;fontSize=14;" value="Initialization" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="35" width="150" x="30" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="phase-mka" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFF8E1;strokeColor=#F9A825;fontStyle=1;fontSize=14;" value="MKA establishment" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="35" width="170" x="30" y="355" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="phase-data" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E8F5E9;strokeColor=#2E7D32;fontStyle=1;fontSize=14;" value="Protected traffic" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="35" width="170" x="30" y="895" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="msg-init" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=block;endFill=1;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" value="macsec_init(config)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="230" y="250" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="630" y="250" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="msg-init-mka" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=block;endFill=1;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" value="initialize participant, derive ICK / KEK"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="630" y="300" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="1030" y="300" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="msg-wait" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=open;endFill=0;html=1;strokeWidth=1;dashed=1;" value="state = WAIT_MKA"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="630" y="340" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="230" y="340" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="msg-tick" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=block;endFill=1;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" value="macsec_tick(now_ms)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="230" y="420" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="630" y="420" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="msg-mka-tick" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=block;endFill=1;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" value="advance timers / request MKPDU"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="630" y="465" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="1030" y="465" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="msg-event" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=open;endFill=0;html=1;strokeWidth=1;dashed=1;" value="control TX event available"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="1030" y="510" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="630" y="510" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="msg-build" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=block;endFill=1;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" value="build control frame"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="630" y="555" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="1030" y="555" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="msg-frame" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=open;endFill=0;html=1;strokeWidth=1;dashed=1;" value="MKPDU"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="1030" y="600" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="630" y="600" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="msg-send" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=block;endFill=1;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" value="transmit MKPDU"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="630" y="645" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="1430" y="645" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="msg-wire1" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=block;endFill=1;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" value="EAPOL / MKA"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="1430" y="690" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="1750" y="690" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="msg-notify" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=block;endFill=1;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" value="notify control TX result"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="230" y="735" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="630" y="735" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="msg-peer-wire" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=block;endFill=1;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" value="peer MKPDU"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="1750" y="780" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="1430" y="780" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="msg-input" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=block;endFill=1;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" value="macsec_input(MKPDU)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="1430" y="825" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="630" y="825" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="msg-process" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=block;endFill=1;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" value="verify MIC, update peer, election, process SAK"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="630" y="870" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="1030" y="870" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="msg-sak" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=open;endFill=0;html=1;strokeWidth=1;dashed=1;" value="SAK available"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="1030" y="915" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="630" y="915" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="msg-secured" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=open;endFill=0;html=1;strokeWidth=1;dashed=1;" value="install TX / RX SAs; state = SECURED"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="630" y="960" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="230" y="960" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="msg-data-out" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=block;endFill=1;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" value="macsec_output(plain frame)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="230" y="1020" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="630" y="1020" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="msg-protected" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=open;endFill=0;html=1;strokeWidth=1;dashed=1;" value="protected Ethernet frame"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="630" y="1065" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="230" y="1065" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="msg-data-send" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=block;endFill=1;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" value="transmit protected frame"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="230" y="1110" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="1430" y="1110" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="msg-data-wire" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=block;endFill=1;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" value="MACsec frame"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="1430" y="1155" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="1750" y="1155" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="note" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFF8E1;strokeColor=#F9A825;dashed=1;fontSize=13;" value="Periodic tick and MKPDU exchange continue in SECURED state for peer liveness and rekey." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="720" x="590" y="1210" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
